policy.lastVerifiedRule: metadata.last_verified in SKILL.md must not be advanced beyond the matching ledger entry's supportedLastVerified date.
policy.productionRule: Evidence type public_docs, package_registry, source_repo, or archival_status must not be used to claim live tenant or live system verification.
policy.vendoredDocsRule: Vendored documents are excluded from freshness claims unless an entry explicitly scopes them.
